texto: I love this life. I feel like I am always catching my breath and saying, 'Oh! Will you look at that?' Photography has been my way of bearing witness to the joy I find in seeing the extraordinary in ordinary life. You don't look for pictures. Your pictures are looking for you.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Harold Feinstein: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I love this life. I feel like I am always catching my breath and saying, 'Oh! Will you look at th…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, joy, i-am pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de joy e i-am.

frase_original: I love this life. I feel like I am always catching my breath and saying, 'Oh! Will you look at that?' Photography has been my way of bearing witness to the joy I find in seeing the extraordinary in ordinary life. You don't look for pictures. Your pictures are looking for you.
